heading: Voluntary retirement after twenty years’ service
label: 2306 Voluntary retirement after twenty years’ service
text: Any enlisted member who has completed twenty years’ service may, upon his own application, in the discretion of the Commandant, be retired from active service.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 14, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 185a (, ).May 24, 1939, ch. 146, § 253 Stat. 755Changes were made in phraseology. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 355 of this title1986— struck out “, with retired pay of the grade or rating with which retired” after “active service”.Pub. L. 99–3481984— substituted reference to enlisted member for reference to enlisted man.Pub. L. 98–557
